seoTitle: Eltham vs Elwood — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Eltham and Elwood. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eltham and Elwood.
heading: Eltham vs Elwood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eltham, Victoria and Elwood, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Elwood has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Eltham (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eltham or Elwood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eltham has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Elwood scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eltham scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Elwood scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eltham or Elwood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Elwood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
